title: Taco Bell Cantina Chicken + Tacos full nutrition table
html:
Third Taco Bell menu screenshot in the same 17-second 4:56 a.m. burst (sibling: part 1 and part 2). Shows the Cantina Chicken family (Avocado Salsa Verde packet, Bowl, Burrito, Crispy Taco, Quesadilla, Soft Taco) + the full Tacos section (Chalupa Supreme variants, Crunchy Taco, Cheesy Gordita Crunch, Doritos Locos Taco, Soft Tacos, Spicy Potato Soft Taco) with full macro columns.

taco bell · brotein · bromenu · fast food nutrition dataset
